title: Akiko
writer: Giuseppe Mangione, Gaspare Cataldo, Luigi Filippo D'Amico
actors: Akiko Wakabayashi, Pierre Brice, Marisa Merlini
plot: The quaint life of Ottavia, a widow living in Rome, is turned upside down when a young and pretty Japanese girl knocks at her door, claiming to be the daughter of her late husband, an Italian military officer who went to Japan on ...
